name: l3c
documentation:
# L3C

L3C provides variant environments facilitating In-Context Learning, featured in the following assets:
- Vast amounts of diversified tasks with minimal inductive bias
- Lifelong In-Context Learning
- Generative and Interactive

# Environments Updating

- [AnyMDP](l3c/anymdp): Procedurally generated unlimited general-purpose Markov Decision Processes (MDP)

- [MetaLanguage](l3c/metalang): Pseudo-language generated from randomized neural networks

- [MazeWorld](l3c/mazeworld): Procedurally generated mazes with diverse maze structures, navigation goals to benchmark object navigation

- [L3C_Baselines](https://github.com/FutureAGI/L3C_Baselines): An implementation of the baseline solutions to the above tasks

# Installation

```bash
pip install l3c
```

# Reference
Cite this work with

```bibtex
@article{wang2024benchmarking,
  title={Benchmarking General Purpose In-Context Learning},
  author={Wang, Fan and Lin, Chuan and Cao, Yang and Kang, Yu},
  journal={arXiv preprint arXiv:2405.17234},
  year={2024}
}
```

Pseudo Langauge Generated from RNN models

classes.name: l3c.metalang.metalangv1.MetaLangV1

methods.name: l3c.metalang.metalangv1.MetaLangV1.add_noise
documentation: Add noise to a sequence, return the new sequence

Meta Language Model
MetaLM(V, n, l, e, L) generates n Exponential(1/l)-length sequences, which appears repeatedly until reaching length L
Each time it repeats, we add a noise by replacing the number with e probablity 
V: Vocabulary Size
l: mean repeating length
e: noise ratio
L: Sequence Length

The task require the agent to recover the correct sequence.

modules.name: l3c.meta_mdp.meta_mdp
documentation: Gym Environment For Maze3D

methods.name: l3c.meta_mdp.meta_mdp.Bandits.sample_task
documentation:
Classical: 1 arm is mean + sqrt(K-1) dev, others are mean - dev / sqrt(K-1)
Uniform:   each arm with expected gain being Uniform(mean - 1.732 * dev, mean + 1.732 * dev)
Gaussian:   Gaussian(mean, dev)

documentation:
The constructor for the class AnyMDPSolverQ
The exploration strategy is controlled by UCB-H with c as its hyperparameter. Increasing c will encourage exploration
Simulation of the ideal policy when the ground truth is not known
Solver for AnyMDPEnv with Model-based Reinforcement Learning

functions.name: l3c.anymdp.solver.check_task_trans
documentation:
Check the quality of the task
Requiring: Q value is diverse
           State is connected
           Route is complex
Returns:
    float: transition quality
    float: value function quality

functions.name: l3c.anymdp.solver.check_task_rewards
documentation:
Check the quality of the task
Requiring: Q value is diverse
           State is connected
           Route is complex
Returns:
    float: transition quality
    float: value function quality

    Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence. PMLR, 2023.
